scripts.test:rules: cross-env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=node_modules/.cache/karri-firebase-cli FIREBASE_EMULATORS_PATH=node_modules/.cache/firebase/emulators firebase emulators:exec --project demo-karri-mobile --config backend/firebase/firebase.json --only firestore "vitest run --config backend/firebase/tests/vitest.config.ts"
scripts.test:functions: cross-env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=node_modules/.cache/karri-firebase-cli FIREBASE_EMULATORS_PATH=node_modules/.cache/firebase/emulators firebase emulators:exec --project demo-karri-mobile --config backend/firebase/firebase.json --only firestore,functions "vitest run --config backend/firebase/functions/tests/vitest.config.ts"
scripts.firebase:validate:storage: cross-env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=node_modules/.cache/karri-firebase-cli FIREBASE_EMULATORS_PATH=node_modules/.cache/firebase/emulators npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --project demo-karri-mobile --config backend/firebase/firebase.json --only storage "node -e \"process.exit(0)\""
scripts.firebase:validate:functions: npm --prefix backend/firebase/functions run build && npm run test:functions
scripts.firebase:validate: npm run firebase:validate:firestore && npm run firebase:validate:storage && npm run firebase:validate:functions
scripts.firebase:deploy:development:firestore:ru: npx firebase-tools deploy --project development --config backend/firebase/firebase.json --only firestore:rules
scripts.firebase:deploy:development:firestore:in: npx firebase-tools deploy --project development --config backend/firebase/firebase.json --only firestore:indexes
scripts.firebase:deploy:development:storage: npx firebase-tools deploy --project development --config backend/firebase/firebase.json --only storage
scripts.firebase:deploy:development:functions: npx firebase-tools deploy --project development --config backend/firebase/firebase.json --only functions
